item.title: Materials
item.description: BI.ZONE in-house and partner research: from cyber risk to business continuity strategies

item.title: Threat Zone 2025
item.description: Research of the cyber threat landscape in Russia and other CIS countries (2025)

item.title: Threat Zone GCC 2024
item.description: Cyber threat overview for the GCC countries in 2024

item.title: Threat Zone 2024
item.description: Research of the cyber threat landscape in Russian and other CIS countries (2024)

item.title: The seven faces of darkness
item.description: A look into the seven popular malware families that have been or continue to be sold as a service on the darknet, and how they are used to attack Russian organizations

item.title: A research into three cybercriminal groups that use leaked ransomware to attack Russian organizations
item.description: The BI.ZONE Cyber Threat Intelligence team takes a look at how malware leaks influence the Russian threat landscape. The experts also review the attacks of the three most prominent hacker groups

item.title: Threat Zone 2020: Not waiting for thunder
item.description: Threat Zone is a large-scale analytical research that highlights the key trends in cyberattacks and their impact on the global economy and business

item.title: The path to digital leadership. Practical guide on incident management
item.description: A manual to ensure business continuity and quick response to incidents in the digital environment
